creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
A FUN Day Trip from NYC - 1 hour train ride 📍Great Swamp National Wildlife Refuge

*transit details and location are pinned in the comments*

 #nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: One of the best day trips I've taken from Manhattan is this 8,000 acre wildlife refuge and the best part is that it's free and it's only a one hour train ride from Penn Station. Once you get there, you'll walk through miles of boardwalk trails in the forest. It's so beautiful, peaceful, plus they have red foxes, whitetail deer, turkeys, and over 200 species of birds. Follow for more fun travel adventures.
